description: Phase 13B balancing remediation workflow governance (analysis only, no forced balancing).

LARGE_RESIDUAL.recommended_action: Review family balancing formula and offset classification; do not force zero

LIFECYCLE_EXCLUSION_GAP.recommended_action: Validate lifecycle-only exclusion (0038) handling in balancing replay

OPTIONAL_COMPONENT_ABSENT.recommended_action: Review optional component policy per family profile

SURRENDER_OFFSET_CYCLE.recommended_action: Review offset-only surrender cycles and cross-claim linkage overlay

DEATH_DECOMPOSITION_GAP.recommended_action: Review Phase 7C decomposition and payee distribution before balancing replay

GENERAL_UNBALANCED.recommended_action: Manual balancing review with full lineage audit
